name: Functional - Invalid Repository URL Validation
description: Ensures that the /process endpoint returns a validation error when an invalid GitHub repository URL is provided.
input: POST /process with SnykProcessRequest containing an invalid repo_url (e.g., 'not_a_url').
output: SnykProcessResponse with success=False, error_code='ERR_INVALID_REPO_URL', and appropriate error message.
error_scenarios: Malformed JSON triggers FastAPI validation error
